_instructions.usage: Fill in every field below with real project data, then seed it with: npx tsx scripts/seed-from-json.ts path/to/this-file.json
rules: Do NOT remove any key — if unknown, leave as null or empty string.
Leave image/document storage_url and url as empty string '' — add via admin Media panel

project.name: Mahagun Mirabella
project.address: Plot No. 3, Sector 79, Noida, Uttar Pradesh 201305
project.description: Ready-to-move-in architectural masterpiece designed by Hafeez Contractor, featuring palatial Roman Neo-classical architecture, double-height balconies, VRF air conditioning, and 16 exclusive luxury villas.
project.long_description: Mahagun Mirabella is a highly distinguished luxury residential development spread over 4.94 acres in Noida's Sector 79. Conceived and designed by the world-famous architect Hafeez Contractor, the project is a striking tribute to grand Roman Neo-classical architecture. Rising G+28 floors across 3 towers with 472 units, the community also features a rare, highly exclusive collection of 16 palatial luxury villas (up to 6,750 sqft). The residences boast premium specifications, including home automation pre-wired systems, centralized hot/cold VRF air-conditioning, and spectacular double-height balconies on every fourth floor. Fully completed and delivered, the project enjoys active flat registries and complete CC/OC status.

builder.name: Mahagun Group
builder.tagline: A Legacy of Trust, Quality, and Innovation
builder.company_overview: Mahagun Group (Nexgen Infracon Private Limited) is one of Delhi-NCR's premier, highly established real estate conglomerates with over 29 years of legacy. Having delivered over 15.76 million sq ft across 11,500 residential units, hotels, and high-street retail malls, the group is synonymous with iconic architectural designs and strict regulatory transparency. Their flagship developments like Mezzaria and Mirabella are NCR benchmarks for luxury execution and full RERA adherence.

Single optical fiber internet connection ports

other_charges.label: VRF AC and Smart Automation Setup

assumptions: Project fully ready-to-move-in with CC/OC received; 0% GST applies.
Transfer processes subject to Nexgen Infracon private administrative guidelines.

decision_profile.decision_thesis: Mahagun Mirabella represents an absolute benchmark in vertical architectural luxury, offering a rare combination of neo-classical Roman grandeur, double-height terraces, and robust private villa configurations on a highly secure legal frame.
why_buy: Outstanding Hafeez Masterpiece: Striking neo-classical exterior arches, Roman pillars, and beautiful drop-off visual circles.
High-End Specifications: Centralized VRF climate control, home automation, and massive double-height balconies.
Active Sovereign Safety: Nexgen Infracon (Mahagun) has clean Noida land registries, active bipartite transfers, and zero outstanding dues.
why_avoid: Vast Maintenance Gearing: Elaborate stone claddings, classical water fountains, and heated jacuzzis lead to high monthly maintenance.
Low Interior Room Carpet Efficiency: Roman column pillars and balconies reduce absolute floor area ratio efficiency slightly.
decision_profile.best_for: NRI buyers, luxury purists, and high-income upgraders looking for grand architecture, home automation, and instant registration security.
decision_profile.not_ideal_for: Frugal budget buyers or investors seeking compact high-yield cash flow rentals.

buyerPersonas.headline: Roman Grandeur and Absolute Peace
reasons: Exquisite double-height terraces with pre-installed VRF cooling systems.
CC/OC completed, immediate transfer, and active registries.

riskRadar.description: Project fully delivered with Completion Certificate.
100% clean title deeds, active bipartite registries.

persona_profile.income_range: Rs 3 Lakhs - Rs 5 Lakhs per month
persona_profile.family_stage: Nuclear family prioritizing status and elite schools
persona_profile.work_location: Noida IT hubs or Central Delhi commercial centers
persona_profile.motivation_note: Aspirations for high lifestyle prestige, unique European-inspired aesthetics, and 100% legal security.

recommendation_profile.primary_thesis: Mahagun Mirabella is the premier architectural statement in Sector 79, Noida. Featuring exquisite Roman neo-classical facades designed by Hafeez Contractor, centralized VRF climate grids, and high-security compliance, it is a rock-solid luxury buy.
recommendation_profile.end_use_thesis: Upgraders looking for European aesthetic frames, large balcony openings, home automation, and immediate transfers directly through the Noida Authority will find this a flawless choice.
recommendation_profile.investment_thesis: A perfect capital preservation wealth play. Neo-classical structures hold resale value significantly better than standard modular towers, commanding a durable 15-20% asset premium.
recommendation_profile.family_thesis: Outstanding. Exquisite clubhouse amenities, heated outdoor spa zones, safe pedestrian corridors, and close proximity to premium CBSE schools.
recommendation_profile.investor_thesis: Low rent cash yields (around 2.8%), but highly stable capital preservation and strong secondary market exit potential.
recommendation_profile.luxury_thesis: Excellent. Represents pure mid-air luxury with double-height balconies, beautiful classical facades, and Otis high-speed lifts.
recommendation_profile.risk_thesis: Zero. Flawless title, no NCLT proceedings, complete CC/OC received, and active registrations.
walk_away_conditions: Frugal buyers looking for cheap entry configurations or low monthly maintenance rates.
negotiation_leverage: Use the slightly higher on-site density of Gaur Sportswood to bargain on the per-sqft rate of resale units.
recommendation_profile.timeline_advice: Perfect buy. Ready-to-move-in luxury inventory is scarce. Acquire immediately if a unit is available under ₹15,000/sqft.

competitors.this_project_advantage: Roman Neo-classical architecture, Hafeez Contractor design, home automation ready, VRF air conditioning, and double-height balconies.
competitors.competitor_advantage: Low density (8 towers vs 3 towers) and 100% corner-flat layout designs.
competitors.verdict: Mahagun Mirabella wins on aesthetic grandness, luxury specifications, and premium villas; Elite Golf Greens wins on ventilation layouts.
competitors.price_delta_note: Priced roughly at par with minor resale configuration variations.
